properties.titulo_evento: Multibillion-dollar contract secures ‘major step forward’ for GCAP fighter jet

properties.descricao: Just over a year after World War II ended, a mob in the Polish city of Kielce killed around 40 Jews, some of them Holocaust survivors. A lie about ritual child murder escalated the violence.
